title: Birth
description: Born in Porbandar, India, as Mohandas Karamchand Gandhi.

title: Travel to South Africa
description: Traveled to South Africa to work as a lawyer and began his civil rights activism.

title: Return to India
description: Returned to India and became a prominent leader in the Indian independence movement.

title: Salt March
description: Led the Salt March to protest the British salt tax, a major act of civil disobedience.

title: Death
description: Assassinated in New Delhi on January 30, 1948.
